summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 56 - Stock Trading System with CGT Calculations. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Stock Trading page, Meeting Prep redesign, and Advisor Command Center. New Trading section added to navigation in Adviser Mode.

issues: Page uses light theme for content area but sidebar remains dark (consistent with app design). The 'dark background classes' detected are from the sidebar navigation, not the main content area.

critical_code_review_comments: Stock Trading system implemented correctly with full CGT calculations following Australian tax law
CGT discount (50%) correctly applied for holdings >12 months for individuals/trusts
Different CGT rates correctly implemented: Individual (marginal), Trust (45%), SMSF (15%), Company (25%)
BHP.AX correctly shows 'Harvest Loss' button since it has unrealized loss
Holdings display CGT Discount eligibility badge
Order preview shows CGT impact before execution
Demo mode clearly indicated - no real money used
Navigation updated with Trading section in Adviser Mode
Meeting Prep page uses consistent light theme for content area
seed_data_creation: None - uses mock data in trading.py with 4 clients (Wheeler Family, Chen Investment Trust, Thompson SMSF, Patel Holdings)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 adds Stock Trading system with CGT calculations. Key APIs: GET /api/trading/holdings/{client_id}, GET /api/trading/cgt-summary/{client_id}, POST /api/trading/calculate-cgt, POST /api/trading/increase-holding, POST /api/trading/decrease-holding, GET /api/trading/brokers, POST /api/trading/order/preview, POST /api/trading/order/execute. All trading is in DEMO MODE - no real money. Navigation includes Trading section in Adviser Mode.

mocked_apis.Trading_System: MOCKED - All trades are simulated in demo mode. No real broker connections.
mocked_apis.Broker_Integrations: MOCKED - OpenMarkets, SelfWealth, Interactive Brokers, CMC Markets listed but require API keys for production
mocked_apis.Market_Prices: MOCKED - Stock prices are static mock data, not real-time
mocked_apis.Order_Execution: MOCKED - Orders are simulated, no real trades executed

api_test_results.GET /api/trading/holding/client_1/CBA.AX: PASS - Returns holding detail with CGT preview
api_test_results.POST /api/trading/calculate-cgt: PASS - CGT calculation with 50% discount for eligible holdings
api_test_results.GET /api/trading/cgt-summary/client_1: PASS - Returns FY24-25 CGT summary with tax planning opportunities
api_test_results.POST /api/trading/order/preview: PASS - Returns order preview with CGT impact
api_test_results.POST /api/trading/order/execute: PASS - Executes order in demo mode
api_test_results.POST /api/trading/increase-holding: PASS - Adds units with weighted average cost update
api_test_results.POST /api/trading/decrease-holding: PASS - Sells units with CGT event recorded
api_test_results.GET /api/trading/brokers: PASS - Returns 4 brokers (all in demo mode)

frontend_test_results.Portfolio_Summary_Cards: PASS - Portfolio Value ($135,210), Cost Base ($122,110), Unrealized Gain ($13,100), Gains (4), Losses (1)
frontend_test_results.Holdings_Display: PASS - All 5 holdings displayed with CGT Discount badges
frontend_test_results.BHP_Harvest_Loss_Button: PASS - Green 'Harvest Loss' button shown for loss-making holding
frontend_test_results.CGT_Summary_Panel: PASS - Entity Type, Unrealized Position, Tax Planning Opportunities displayed
frontend_test_results.Quick_Info_Section: PASS - CGT Discount info, SMSF Rate, EOFY reminder
frontend_test_results./meeting-prep: PASS - Light theme content, AI-Powered badge, Today's Meetings, All Clients grid
frontend_test_results./advisor-command-center: PASS - All 10 zones verified, unified command center working
